prompt: Create a square 1:1 profile picture using the uploaded image as the exact reference for the pose, composition, and pixel art style. Recreate the subject as detailed retro pixel art, with large visible pixels, defined stair-stepped edges, strong dark outlines, dramatic pixelated shading, vibrant colors, and a crisp 16-bit/32-bit arcade sprite look. Use only a flat solid Pantone 354C green background (#00B140). No gradients, textures, text, logos, extra objects, or photorealism. Keep the raised glove, facial features, framing, and overall style exactly the same as the reference.
